summary: Iteration 2: Tested Statistics & Reports module (backend + frontend). 16/16 backend pytest pass for /api/reports/* (kpis, timeseries day/hour, products top/bottom, hourly 24, weekday 7, payment-methods, orders sorted desc, RBAC 403 for waiter/cashier/kitchen, seed idempotency). Frontend Reports tab renders correctly: 4 KPI cards with sales/orders/avg + delta%, all 5 recharts (evolution line, top-products bar, methods pie, hourly area, weekday bar) render SVG, 100 closed orders in detail table with 10-item bottom-products section, presets (today/yesterday/week/month/year) and custom date inputs+Aplicar both trigger reload correctly, order-row click opens order-detail panel, 0 JS errors. Seed integrity: 290 closed seed orders YTD, no duplication.

issues: Context note said 'tab-reports is default' but defaultValue in <Tabs> is 'products' — Reportes tab opens only on click. Verify whether this is intended; if Reports should be default landing for admin, change defaultValue='reports' on the Tabs root.

action_items: Optional: set defaultValue='reports' on AdminDashboard <Tabs> if Reportes is supposed to be the default tab (current default is 'products').
Optional (carry-over from iter 1): add aria-describedby on dialogs, split server.py (now 845 lines) into routers.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew to 845 lines — past the 700-line guideline; reports section should be extracted to /backend/routers/reports.py.

_closed_orders_in_range filters strictly on closed_at via ISO string comparison; works because all timestamps are stored in UTC ISO with same length, but a timezone-aware Mongo Date type would be safer long-term.
Seed historical block uses 'created_by': 'seed' marker for idempotency — verified correctly: not duplicated on backend hot reload (290 YTD orders stable across multiple test runs).

Reports.jsx loadAll() uses Promise.all on 7 endpoints — good; passes spanDays<=2 → 'hour' bucket, otherwise 'day'. Auto-refresh every 60s is enabled (could be a perf concern long-term but acceptable).
All /api/reports/* endpoints correctly require_roles('admin') — waiter/cashier/kitchen all return 403 (verified in pytest).
test_credentials: admin@pos.com/admin123, mesero@pos.com/mesero123, caja@pos.com/caja123, cocina@pos.com/cocina123 — all working
seed_data_creation: Backend seed_data() seeds ~270-330 historical closed orders over last 30 days (created_by='seed'). Idempotent: gated on count_documents({'created_by':'seed'})==0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports backend fully tested with /app/backend/tests/test_reports.py (16 tests, ~9s). Reports tab is reachable from AdminDashboard via [data-testid="tab-reports"] but is NOT the default tab (default is products). All chart components render correctly with seeded data. No bugs found.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs to RCA. Only one minor design ambiguity noted re: default admin tab.
